tool.name: sqli_tester
tool.description: Test for SQL injection vulnerabilities in web applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Comprehensive SQL injection testing (error-based, blind, time-based) - Quick detection of SQL injection - Database fingerprinting (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Oracle, SQLite) - Identify exploitable injection points

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action to perform: - test: Comprehensive SQL injection testing - detect: Quick detection of SQL injection - fingerprint: Attempt to identify database type

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL with parameter to test

parameter.name: param
parameter.description: Name of the parameter to test for SQL injection

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: HTTP method to use: GET or POST (default: GET)

returns.description: SQL injection test results with findings and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Comprehensive SQL injection test
test https://example.com/page?id=1 id
# Quick detection
detect https://example.com/page?id=1 id
# Fingerprint database
fingerprint https://example.com/page?id=1 id
